name: Familjen Grotesk
license: Open Source / SIL Open Font License
description:
Familjen Grotesk is a sans serif typeface with a contemporary appearance intended for both text and display. Large notches, known as “ink traps”, add style to headlines and clarity to captions. The large x-height, closed apertures and sturdy upper-case letters relate to the grotesque subgenre of sans serifs.

Familjen Grotesk project is led by Kristian Möller, a type designer based in Stockholm. The Latin component was designed by Anders Wikström, Jonas Bäckman, Matilda Gysing, Kristian Möller, Örjan Nordling ( Familjen STHLM AB/)).

Familjen Grotesk is licensed under the SIL Open Font License. You can find more details about this project here.
